programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A woman takes her former friend and contractor to court, asserting that the deck he revamped was not just incomplete but posed a safety risk to her 16-month-old baby; the contractor defends his work, citing budget constraints.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A graduation road trip spirals into a drug-fueled crime spree, leading to a legal battle between two teenage girls; stories involve marijuana possession, an intentional deer collision, and a two-hour high-speed police chase across four counties.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.sub-title: In Know You Cheated: I Have the Receipts
programme.desc: What happens to couples when one member is desperate to prove their fidelity, while the other has proof that they cheated? Steve unpacks stories in which guests think they have their partners caught red-handed in outside dalliances!

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: This Guy Better Be Hot; Truth: Am I Number 14 or Not?
programme.desc: Jariah's ex-boyfriend, Stedman, had a baby with Jariah's best friend, Tykena -- and Tykena believes there's more he's not telling; after an extensive genealogy search, Carla uncovers a potential sister named Chrystal, and the women believe they share the same father, who is not the man Carla always believed was her dad.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: A woman who suffered abuse as a child is convinced her neighbor is guilty of neglect.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: In part two, the Judge must decide if a woman's allegations are justified as feuding neighbors sue for the 10k court maximum over an alleged assault and shocking charges of child endangerment.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A woman sues her ex-landlord, alleging negligence that caused her service horse, Ruby, to injure her leg on nails sticking out of a stable door; the landlord countersues, citing lease violations and pointing to a signed release of liability.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A 29-year-old man, who was adopted from foster care as a child, takes legal action against his estranged aunt, seeking $10,000 in damages for wrongful eviction and property damage.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.sub-title: Did You Watch Him Torture Your Son?
programme.desc: Rose says her young nephew told her that he was sexually abused and that his mother was involved; Ironniesha lost custody of all of her children when one of them was found to be covered with bruises and injured internally.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Truth: Dad Denied Me Until He Died; Unlock: I Think You're Cheating With My Family Member
programme.desc: Adopted Yvette connected with Tiffiny, who could be her sister, but the man Yvette believed was her father denied her until his dying day; Jervaris caught his boyfriend, Jo'Rico, on a dating app, messaging someone in his own family.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: A young widow with a newborn baby claims her deceased husband's best friend stole money from his account; the best friend defends his actions passionately and says the money went to a GoFundMe set up for his children.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: Former army buddies pool their resources to purchase one luxury vehicle in order to start a car rental business; a doomed rental ends with the vehicle being wrecked, their insurance being dropped and thousands in damage.
